F108 Rule 34.31(2) substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 128 (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


#### Payment of sums due under a registered order E+W


34.32. —(1) Where an order is registered in accordance with [ F109 Article 23 of the 2007 Hague Convention ] the court [ F110 may ] order that payment of sums due under the order be made [ F111 to the court, at such time and place as directed. ]


(2) Where the court orders payments to be made to the court F112 ..., whether in accordance with paragraph (1) or otherwise, the court officer must send the payments by post either—


(Practice Direction 34A contains further provisions relating to the payment of sums due under registered orders.)


Textual Amendments


F109 Words in rule 34.32(1) substituted (31.12.2020) by The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 19(11) (with reg. 27 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1574 , regs. 1 , 4(2) and S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(f) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


F110 Word in rule 34.32(1) substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 129(a)(i) (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2

metadata.title: Part 34 — Reciprocal Enforcement of Maintenance Orders
